title: Licensed Practical Nurse
description: Fortrea, a leading clinical research services company, is seeking a Licensed Practical Nurse to support patient care in our Tampa clinical research facility. You'll provide direct patient care during clinical trials while working in a hybrid model that offers flexibility. Help advance medicine while building your nursing career in a supportive research environment.
responsibilities: Administer medications and treatments under physician supervision in accordance with protocol requirements
Collect vital signs and patient specimens for clinical research studies
Assess patient health status and document observations in electronic health records
Monitor patients for adverse events and report safety concerns to study team
Provide patient education regarding study procedures and medication adherence
Maintain infection control and safety protocols in the clinical facility

requirements.education: Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN) credential from accredited program
skills: Knowledge of clinical trial procedures and Good Clinical Practice (GCP)
Strong patient assessment and communication skills
Proficiency with electronic health records (EHR) systems
Ability to work with diverse patient populations
Attention to detail and regulatory compliance
certifications: GCP certification required within 60 days of hire

benefits: Hybrid schedule with flexibility for on-site clinical work
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
Professional development and continuing education reimbursement
Access to Fortrea's employee wellness resources
